product: Genie Agent and Databricks Assistant on AWS GovCloud
tagline: Now generally available for secure cloud solutions in compliance with U.S. regulations.
what_it_does: Genie Agent and Databricks Assistant are now fully operational on Databricks on AWS GovCloud, providing U.S. government customers with a compliant platform that adheres to FedRAMP High and DoD IL5 standards. This offering includes enhanced security features such as a compliance security profile, which enforces specific instance types and monitoring capabilities. The service is exclusively operated by U.S. citizens and ensures that customer data remains within U.S. government cloud regions.
why_it_matters: This update is crucial for U.S. government agencies and contractors needing a secure and compliant data analytics platform. By leveraging Genie and Databricks Assistant, organizations can enhance their data-driven decision-making while ensuring adherence to stringent regulatory requirements, ultimately improving operational efficiency and reducing compliance risks.
plain_summary: Genie Agent and Databricks Assistant are now available on Databricks for AWS GovCloud, ensuring compliance with U.S. government regulations.

capabilities.title: Compliance Security Profile
capabilities.desc: Automatically enforces security measures to meet FedRAMP High compliance.

capabilities.title: U.S. Data Residency
capabilities.desc: Ensures all customer data is stored and processed within U.S. government cloud regions.

capabilities.title: Single Sign-On Support
capabilities.desc: Requires SSO authentication for secure access to the platform.

capabilities.title: Enhanced Monitoring
capabilities.desc: Includes automatic cluster updates and security monitoring features.

prerequisites: Single sign-on authentication must be configured.
PrivateLink must be set up for back-end and front-end connections.
use_cases: Data analytics for U.S. government agencies.
Secure data processing for contractors working with federal projects.
Compliance reporting and monitoring for sensitive data operations.
limitations: Certain features like in-product messaging and Databricks Marketplace are unavailable.
Fleet instances are not supported in AWS GovCloud.
key_takeaway: The availability of Genie Agent and Databricks Assistant on AWS GovCloud enhances secure data analytics capabilities for U.S. government entities.
